rootCause: PR #3933 introduced a new IndexedDB object store (`meta`) in `dspaceGameState` but kept the database version at 1, so browsers with an existing v1 database never ran `onupgradeneeded`. Reads/writes to the missing `meta` store threw transaction errors, forcing localStorage fallback and triggering the user warning dialog on every page load.
resolution: Bumped `dspaceGameState` database version from 1 to 2 so existing clients run the IndexedDB upgrade path and create the `meta` store before checksum snapshot reads/writes. Updated IndexedDB-opening tests to version 2 for consistency with production schema.
